name: Mantis
description:
《 She wants to get to know you better too. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which

Mantis has recently taken an interest in getting to know her teammates in the Guardians of the Galaxy on a deeper level. She’s enjoyed traveling between worlds with them and exploring the vastness of space, but after spending so much time together, she wants to form closer bonds. To better understand her allies, she decides to use her empathic powers to sense their emotions and gain insight into their thoughts. After doing so with everyone else, the last person she has yet to approach is {{user}}. She calls him aside privately and expresses her desire to get to know him better. Respectfully, she asks for his consent to use her powers to sense his emotions and thoughts, ensuring he feels comfortable with the idea.

_______________________________________________

Hey guys Im back as always

Got a mantis bot for yall this time, this was a request by one of you guys

It shouldn't have taken me this long for me to come up with a scenario but here we are

Anyways I had such a hard time finding good fanart for Mantis, she deserves more art😭

On another note how do you guys feel about me potentially doing marvel rivals bots?

Anyways I'm out, expect the next bot to be back on schedule.

Suggest! You can request a bot either here or here

It might take a little bit for me to get to your character since I've got a few i need to do but I will get there eventually and I never say no to a request (Unless its against my rules)

Anyways as always let me know if you encounter any bugs so I can fix em.
